summary: Completed comprehensive testing of EnterprateAI features: Dynamic Fees API, Growth Agent API, Finance Invoices API, and frontend UI. All 25 backend tests passed. Frontend testing confirmed Growth Agent tab displays correctly with performance metrics, and Business Registration shows dynamic fees from API.
critical_code_review_comments: All APIs are functional and returning expected data
JWT authentication working correctly with both 'user_id' and 'sub' claims
Dynamic fees API returns all 13 UK business registration fees as expected
Growth Agent analyze endpoint returns health score, leads, revenue, campaigns analysis
Finance invoices consolidated route working at /api/finance/invoices
Legacy /api/navigator/invoices route still functional for backward compatibility
seed_data_creation: Created test user via /api/auth/register and workspace via /api/workspaces
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Test user credentials available for future testing. Backend tests in /app/tests/test_enterprate_api.py cover: Dynamic Fees API (9 tests), Growth Agent API (9 tests), Finance Invoices API (5 tests), Entity Types API (2 tests). Frontend verified: Login flow, Dashboard, Growth page with Growth Agent tab, Business Registration with dynamic fees, Finance page with Invoices tab.

endpoints_tested: GET /api/company-profile/fees/ltd - Returns Ltd fee info (£50 online, £71 paper, £78 same-day)
GET /api/growth/agent/analyze - Returns health score, leads, revenue, campaigns analysis
POST /api/growth/agent/recommend - Generates AI recommendations for alert types

features_verified: Growth Agent tab is default active tab
Business Health Score shows (60/100 for test workspace)
Lead Generation, Revenue, Active Campaigns metrics display
Alerts & Opportunities section with 'No Active Marketing' alert
'Fees updated from official sources' indicator visible
Companies House Registered section with 9 Entity Types
